exercise_requirement: Gradually compare frozen features, trainable head, final block, final third, and limited full fine-tuning with controlled optimization.
research_question: How much validation improvement justifies unfreezing additional pretrained parameters?
hypothesis: Partial fine-tuning may improve category-sensitive features, but full fine-tuning will overfit unless tightly controlled.
random_seed_policy: primary seed 42; retained comparisons repeat seeds 42, 43, and 44
prerequisites: VIS-002 champion frozen backbone selected on validation only.
Explicit operator approval for Tier 4 execution.
safety_notes: Do not load, inspect, score, or tune against the locked test split.
